index.title: Overview
index.description: Watch the trailer and follow the latest release updates for Open Mic Odyssey.

content.hero_sublede_1: Subscribe to our channels for updates, news, and upcoming preview screenings. Be the first to know when or where screenings will take place. We will be updating our community with exclusive content, including extended interviews, behind-the-scenes footage, and early access to new cuts of the film. Don't miss out on your chance to be a part of the Open Mic Odyssey community.
content.hero_sublede_2: Start with the trailer, then move into the film page, media, or connect hub depending on what you want next. Explore our gallery to see high-resolution production stills and behind-the-scenes photos. Connect with our community on social media, Discord and Patreon to find out how you can support the film and get access to exclusive perks, such as your name in the credits, early access to new cuts, and special merchandise. Connect with us on social media to join the conversation and share your own open mic stories.

content.synopsis_body_1: A documentary road story about stand-up stages, hotel suites, long drives, and the emotional math of trying to make a creative life real.
content.synopsis_body_2: Follow documentary film updates here as our stand-up comedy film moves from trailer release toward wider screenings.

film.title: Film
film.description: Read the synopsis, credits, and screening access details for Open Mic Odyssey.

content.synopsis_body_1: This documentary film is an independent road trip documentary rooted in live stand-up sets and long-distance friendship. The film follows three best friends and aspiring stand-up comedians as they hit the road for a cross-country tour in a self-driving Tesla, performing at various open mic nights and long drives in between.
content.synopsis_body_2: In this documentary, we explore the dedication, the heartbreak, the camaraderie, and the undeniable passion required to chase a dream that most people consider crazy, and give an intimate look at the world of stand-up comedy and three friends supporting each other on their journey to make a creative life real. The road to success is paved with bad jokes, tough crowds, and endless miles.
content.synopsis_body_3: It is a character-first road film: funny, uncertain, and emotionally grounded instead of over-explained.
themes: The comedy grind as lived experience
content.audience_body: Best positioned for viewers interested in independent documentary, performance culture, and road stories with personality.
content.credits_description: Independent documentary credits and comedy documentary cast details are listed below for press and audience reference.
